ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "sku_code" INTEGER /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) code for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electronics, clothing) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., height, width, depth) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the system */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the product was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "store_area" REAL /* Total area of the store */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_store_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the product is located */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reorder (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "minimum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sales_qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "mrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's Recommended Retail Price (MRP) */,
  "sp" REAL /* Selling Price (SP) */,
  "margin" REAL /* Profit margin */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., in-store, online) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the sale */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the sale */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outliers" (
  "outlier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlier */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being flagged as an outlier */,
  "outlier_type" TEXT /* Type of outlier (e.g., high sales, low sales) */,
  "z_score" REAL /* Z-score indicating the degree of outlier-ness */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the outlier */,
  "flagged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who flagged the outlier */,
  "flagged_date" TEXT /* Date when the outlier was flagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outliers_flagged_by FOREIGN KEY ("flagged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outliers_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores_products" (
  "store_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store-product entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the store-product relationship was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sales_qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., weekly, monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "mrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's Recommended Retail Price (MRP) */,
  "sp" REAL /* Selling Price (SP) */,
  "margin" REAL /* Profit margin */,
  "price_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the price was last changed */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_pricing_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being moved */,
  "from_location" TEXT /* Location from which the product is being moved */,
  "to_location" TEXT /* Location to which the product is being moved */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being moved */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date when the movement occurred */,
  "reason_for_movement" TEXT /* Reason for the movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse manager */,
  "warehouse_capacity" REAL /* Total capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_warehouse_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, inventory analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_warehouse" (
  "dw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data warehouse entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sales_qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system of the data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_warehouse_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_warehouse_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being forecasted */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the forecast is being made */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_sales" INTEGER /* Forecasted sales quantity */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_forecasts_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_forecasts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_optimization" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being optimized */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the optimization is being made */,
  "optimization_date" TEXT /* Date of the optimization */,
  "recommended_qty" INTEGER /* Recommended inventory quantity */,
  "optimization_method" TEXT /* Method used for the optimization */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the optimization recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_optimization_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_optimization_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
